title: phymatodes triloba
intro: Phymatodes triloba, also known as the three-lobed bitter orange, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, native to China and India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Phymatodes triloba include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used to make infusions and salves for topical application.
